text.title: Linear Agent as First-Class Assignee Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the tracker-linear-agent-as-assignee methodology end-to-end. Decision-gates surface stops when inputs do not pass.

step.name: stand-up-identities
step.action: Create one Linear user per agent vendor; set distinct avatars + display names.

step.name: wire-mcp
step.action: Register each vendor's MCP client; confirm permission inheritance from human owner.

step.name: define-delegation
step.action: Configure each agent to post a task-list comment + ETA within 60s of assignment.

step.name: set-checkpoint-cadence
step.action: Set checkpoint cadence to 10-15 min via templates/checkpoint-comment.md.

step.name: limit-transitions
step.action: Restrict agent transitions to In Progress + In Review; humans own Done.
